title: Megaclinium strobiliferum
taxonomy: Megaclinium strobiliferum is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It belongs to the genus Megaclinium, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. The Megaclinium strobiliferum is classified as an epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants but does not derive nutrients from them. Megaclinium strobiliferum is a member of the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Its classification also includes the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Cymbidieae.

The health benefits of Megaclinium strobiliferum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
